narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 1-C (precinct in Ross County) has 747 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.6 percentage points.
